failedAssertions.reason: Feature not implemented - duplicate procedure functionality does not exist in UI. No 'Duplicar' button exists on procedure cards. This feature is pending in tramites-reportes-auditoria-config milestone (admin-tramites-redesign).
Data blocker - staff Carlos Pérez has 0 active bookings today so there's nothing to reassign. UI works but requires actual booking data to exercise the reassign flow.
Data blocker - no bookings available to select (0 booking records). Cannot test booking actions (confirm, release, reassign) since they only appear when a booking row is selected.
Data blocker - no reservation series exist in database (0 booking_series records). Cannot test series instance modifications since action buttons only appear when a series is selected.

appliedUpdates.description: Added admin credentials (admin@simut.test / AdminTest123!). Note: password had to be regenerated via seed script due to stale password hash preventing login.

summary: Round 9 user testing: 45/49 pass. 4 assertions remain failed/blocked due to: (1) data blockers - no bookings or series in database for VAL-USERS-005, VAL-REPORTES-002, VAL-REPORTES-004; (2) missing feature - duplicate procedure not implemented for VAL-TRAMITES-005. All implementation features for dashboard-citas-usuarios are complete. Data blockers require seeding real booking/series data. VAL-TRAMITES-005 requires admin-tramites-redesign feature from next milestone.
